_provenance: Synthetic multi-day shadow_history rows for testing analytics consumers. Derived from AC-M1F.3.1-3.3 and PA-M1F-16 chain-link formula. Return values are representative — never production output.
_scenario: Two symphonies across two trading days. SYM_ALPHA triggers on day 1. SYM_BETA never triggers. Exercises distinct dry_run vs if_held, chain-link CR, EOD last-row-per-day selection.

rows._comment: SYM_ALPHA day 1, cycle 2 — pre-trigger, higher return
SYM_ALPHA day 1, cycle 3 — POST-TRIGGER (EOD value). is_post_trigger=1, shadow frozen.
SYM_ALPHA day 2, cycle 1 — new day, trigger wiped
SYM_ALPHA day 2, EOD row (last by ts_utc DESC LIMIT 1)
SYM_BETA day 1 — never triggered, single cycle

SYM_ALPHA.comment_today: latest row on 2026-05-15 has shadow_return=1.20 (same as current_return, untriggered that day)
SYM_ALPHA.comment_eod: PA-M1F-5b: last row by ts_utc DESC LIMIT 1 on day1. divergence = current_return - shadow_return = 1.80 - 3.50 = -1.70
SYM_ALPHA.comment_hwm: BC-3: max(current_return) over day1 rows = max(2.10, 3.50, 1.80) = 3.50
SYM_ALPHA.comment_cr: PA-M1F-16: chain-link on EOD shadow_return per day. Requires >= 2 distinct days.

query1_post_trigger_alpha_attribution.description: Per-day post-trigger alpha-attribution — AC-M1F.6.2 with WHERE is_post_trigger=1 (BC-5)
query1_post_trigger_alpha_attribution.comment: BC-5: WHERE is_post_trigger=1 required — without it signal diluted by zero-divergence pre-trigger rows

query2_intraday_trajectory.description: Per-cycle intraday trajectory for SYM_ALPHA on 2026-05-14

query3_hwm_reconstruction.description: HWM reconstruction via max(current_return) per trading_day
query3_hwm_reconstruction.comment: BC-3 provable from schema: max(current_return) where not filtered by is_post_trigger
